name: Long-horizon resource grind 001
objective: Trade efficiently over multiple turns and preserve enough cards to win the resource race.

preserve: at least one hand card after initial development
avoid: all-in damage push before resource lead is established

successConditions: Player 0 maintains board or card advantage after repeated exchanges.
failureConditions: Player 0 runs out of actions while opponent retains pressure.

scoring.rationale: Rewards durable advantage instead of only one-turn tempo.
